name: com.nathanielh2013.lordbreakerxsstatmanager
description: Flexible and extensible stat system for Unity featuring customizable stat profiles, reusable templates, and dynamic modifier support. Create profiles containing any number of float or integer stats with configurable base values and stat-specific modifier behavior. Templates allow rapid profile creation by automatically adding predefined stat sets. Ideal for difficulty settings, level balancing, progression systems, enemy variants, and other stat-driven gameplay mechanics. Features ▪ Custom editor tools for creating and managing stat profiles ▪ Support for both float and integer stats ▪ Configurable base values and stat modifiers ▪ Stat-specific modifier behavior and progression logic ▪ Reusable stat templates for faster setup ▪ Automatic template stat population when creating profiles ▪ Multiple profiles for handling different gameplay variations ▪ Suitable for difficulty systems, levels, enemies, and progression systems ▪ Designed for scalability, flexibility, and easy integration into existing Unity projects
